mapper.select: select id, voice, name, types, status, create_user, create_dept, create_time, update_user, update_time, is_deleted, level, text, isopen, is_send, send_user, is_receive from a_alert_info where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into a_alert_info(id, voice, name, types, status, create_user, create_dept, create_time, is_deleted, level, text, isopen, is_send, send_user, is_receive) values(#{id}, #{voice}, #{name}, #{types}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{createDept}, sysdate(), #{isDeleted}, #{level}, #{text}, #{isopen}, #{isSend}, #{sendUser}, #{isReceive})
mapper.update:
update a_alert_info
voice=#{voice}, name=#{name}, types=#{types}, status=#{status}, level=#{level}, text=#{text}, isopen=#{isopen}, is_send=#{isSend}, send_user=#{sendUser}, is_receive=#{isReceive}, update_user=#{updateUser}, update_time=sysdate()
where id=#{id} and is_deleted='0'
update a_alert_info set is_deleted='1', update_time=sysdate() where id in #{id}
